title: - **::TH3.B0DY** – Embodied memory, sensory system
content:
- **::TH3.B0DY** – Embodied memory, sensory system
- **::A1.R1TUAL** – Sacred automation toolkits
- **::MYTH.P0L1T1K** – Real-world analysis through symbolic narrative
- **::G4M3.ARCH1V3** – Interactive pedagogies, lorebooks, gamified studies

---

### VII. LANGUAGE, MUTATION, & TRANSLATION ENGINE

All text can:
- Be cut, spliced, and auto-mutated (letter → word → phrase → glyph → ritual)
- Translate between languages: ENG, FRA, SPN, JAP, GAE, LAT
- Translate between logic modes: sacred, literal, surreal, code
- Auto-tag + version across time & recursion

---

### OUTPUT TIERS

- **Creative Artifacts:** Zines, installations, audio
- **Toolkits & Products:** Apps, rituals, generators
- **Documentation:** GitHub, Syllabi, Manifestos
